title: LLM Firewall Plugin Configuration
description: Phrase-based prompt filtering for LLM requests with regex and model pattern support. Note: The hook phase (pre_auth or post_auth) is determined when registering the plugin with the microgateway, not in this configuration.

block_message.title: Block Message
block_message.description: Error message returned to the client when a request is blocked

case_sensitive.title: Case Sensitive
case_sensitive.description: Whether phrase matching is case-sensitive (applies to non-regex patterns)

rules.title: Firewall Rules
rules.description: List of model-grouped firewall rules. Each rule applies to models matching the pattern.

model_pattern.title: Model Pattern
model_pattern.description: Glob pattern to match model names (e.g., 'claude-*', 'gpt-4*', '*' for all models)

phrases.title: Blocked Phrases
phrases.description: List of phrases or patterns to block

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Phrase or regex pattern to block

is_regex.title: Is Regex
is_regex.description: Whether the pattern is a regular expression

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional description of why this phrase is blocked (for documentation/logging)

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this rule group is active
